title: Euploca calvariavis
taxonomy: Euploca calvariavis is classified within the family Boraginaceae. It belongs to the genus Euploca, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the blue forget-me-nots. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its leaf shape and flower color. The family Boraginaceae is a group of flowering plants that are often found in dry, temperate regions. Further classification within the plant kingdom includes its order, family, genus, and species.

benefits: Euploca calvariavis, while less commonly studied than other Euploca species, is reported to have potential health benefits due to its rich antioxidant properties and ability to inhibit the growth of certain microorganisms.
